"Here is the first part of the analysis regarding the total count of numbers on the board.

midnight brings a quiet time to solve this complex math puzzle with care.

The sum of the five largest values equals twenty-nine percent of the whole total.

The sum of the five smallest values equals twenty-six percent of the whole total.

These two groups combined represent fifty-five percent of all the numbers present.

This leaves forty-five percent for the remaining numbers in the middle range.

We must find how many numbers fit into that remaining portion of the sum.

The calculation suggests that there are exactly ten numbers in the middle section.

Adding the five largest, five smallest, and ten middle numbers gives twenty numbers total."
